CustomField.description: Per-line minimum NetUnitPrice after promo adjustments on the quote side, sourced from Pricing_Matrix__c.Floor_Price__c by the Price Matrix pricing element. Used by the Apply Promotion Value formula as the lower bound when computing the final net price on a quote line. Null = no floor (effective floor of 0). Mirrors OrderItem.Floor_Price__c for symmetry between Quote and Order flows.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-populated from the Pricing Matrix entry. Read-only at the quote-line level.
CustomField.label: Floor Price
